title: Julie Armstrong
compiled_truth: Julie Armstrong is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-17 to 2002-05-06), Julie Armstrong sent 176 and received 348 emails, totalling 524 interactions. Top correspondents: [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (68), [Stephen Dowd](people/stephen-dowd) (31), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (29), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (27), [Eric Gadd](people/eric-gadd) (25). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, action_items_in, calendar, contacts, corporate, deleted_items.
